name: Black Ant Queen
description: A unique queen found deep within the Black Anthill. More than an enemy, she is a choice-driven event that decides what you can craft and how the colony behaves afterward.
behavior: She remains still until the player feeds her. After that, the result cannot be reversed in the same save except by moving into a new NG+ cycle.
interactionWithPlayer: The player can feed her a yummy, poisoned, or infected Gum Sandwich. Each variant locks out the others and permanently changes the queen, her loot, and the future of the anthill.
interactionWithCreatures: She governs the black ants in her territory and determines whether they remain a normal colony, become hostile to the player, or later twist into an infected colony.
strategy: The best route depends on your goal. If you want the pet and colony diplomacy, the yummy route is safest; if you want every material and mount recipe, the lethal route pays more; if you plan around NG+, the infected path sets up exclusive content.
specialTraits: Yummy gum route: grants a Baby Black Ant, its gold card, and Antbassador progress; workers and soldiers in the shed area also become temporarily neutral while the mutation is equipped.
Poisoned route: kills the queen, lets you loot the body, and opens the hidden lab behind her with sturdy quartzite, NG+ chests, and another exit.

Infected route: repeats the immediate effects of the poisoned route, but in the next New Game+ the queen returns infected and part of the anthill turns into a civil war between normal and infected ants.

combatStats.attackDamageSummary: Not a traditional combat encounter; it functions as an interactive choice event.
